title: LDHHYH 12pcs Measuring Jugs 1 Litre, Kitchen Measuring Jug with Measuring Scale, Stackable Plastic Measuring Jugs, Plastic Jug Cups for Kitchen Baking, Sugar, Milk, Oil
features: Premium Material -- Made from high quality plastic, our 1 litre plastic measuring jug is durable, lightweight,sturdy, and strong. Easy for you to use, lasting for a long service time. Our plastic measuring jug has also been designed to endure falls without it easily cracking or breaking.

Precise measurements -- Our plastic measuring jug has two units of measurement, including pint and milliliter, the scale is clear for easy reading. The jug has accurate scale markings for capacity measurement to ensure precise quantity is poured for a particular usage.can be used for a variety of baking needs.

Easy to Use -- Our plastic measuring jug is light weight and has a wide mouth design making it easy to clean and use. The handle is ergonomically designed, allowing for an easy, comfortable grip, and features a slight angle for easy pouring.

Package Includes -- Comes with 12 pcs plastic measuring jugs set, in the capacity of 1000ml, allows a nesting, stackable solution for easy storage. Which will provide more convenience for your daily life, enough for your daily use. It is not recommended to put the plastic jug in the dishwasher avoid reducing the service life.

Widely Used -- Plastic measuring jug 1 litre is applied in laboratory, tea shop, bakery, bar, restaurant, and kitchen, suitable for accurately measuring water, flour, rice, coffee, wine, milk, sugar, and more.
